title: 日本ダービーの後に・慙愧

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (It's all right! I changed into my backup shoes!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(And I attached my cleats properly! ...See, they
feel perfectly fine.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (There's nothing off about them...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Nothing at all!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond lets out a fierce roar, as if
tearing herself free from something, and kicks off
the turf to launch herself out the gates.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And in the front, it's Satono Diamond! This year's
Derby champion is Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond won! Did you see the way she
sprinted down the final stretch?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It looked like she still had some stamina to spare
too! She probably won't have any issues snagging
the win at the Kikuka Sho either!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(My shoes were... fine. But even so, they were in
the back of my mind the whole time I was
running...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (What a disgraceful performance...)

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Satono Diamond! How does it
feel to be crowned a Derby champion?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. It's an honor to have my name
etched in Umamusume history.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This victory here at the Japanese Derby is also a
great honor for the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the Satono Group will be elated by your
performance!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I believe so too, but I'm also sure they'll also
warn me against letting this go to my head.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! But I'm sure that ambition of yours is what
gives you such strength!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's as you say. I've always been told not to settle
for where I am, and to aim for ever greater
heights.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I promise to perform even better at
my next race than I did today!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's what we like to hear! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I won't disappoint you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tension melts from Satono Diamond the
moment she enters the runners' tunnel. Her usual
expression returns as she lets out a long sigh.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we reach the waiting room, her face
has become clouded with displeasure.
choice_data_list:
Congratulations on becoming a Derby
champion!

Congratulations on becoming a Derby
champion!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you. But...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Though I may be a Derby champion, I feel so
ashamed of my performance...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
While I was running... all I could think about were
my shoes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even though they felt totally fine, I couldn't help
but check them over and over again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I... I was afraid of the jinx...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I let it get to me and failed to give my best
performance on the track!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I can't forgive myself for that!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I vowed not to let the jinx get the best of me! I
swore it, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I am to achieve the Satono family dream, I can't
allow even the slightest modicum of doubt to
take root in my mind!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If some formidable jinx tries to block my path, I
must acquire the strength to overcome it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll become so strong that nothing can faze me, so
perfectly adapted that nothing can catch me off
guard!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And I'll use that strength to overwhelm any jinx or
misfortune that dares get in my way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives a refreshing declaration of her intent to
succeed. I'm left awestruck.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Earth to Trainer!
choice_data_list: Leave the training schedule to me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! That's my Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We'll show everyone a flawless race at the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I invite Satono Diamond to a cafe on our way
back from the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to treat her to something sweet to give
her a boost in her fight to overcome her jinx.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can order whatever I like? Well, then... Is it okay
if I have a fruit parfait topped with cheesecake
bites?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll also have a triple scoop of ice
cream on top, with rice flour dumplings, jelly
cubes, and some extra fruit...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I don't think the parfait cup will be able to
hold anything else. Thanks, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, we hear someone from a nearby table
mention a familiar name.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
The results of the Takarazuka Kinen interim fan
vote are out! Kitasan Black is number one!

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw! I voted for her too, so I'm super
happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans vote to decide who is invited to run in
the Takarazuka Kinen. Voting isn't finished yet,
but it appears Kitasan Black is the favorite so far.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She was incredible in the spring Tenno Sho! She
was overtaken, but she managed to catch back
up and win by a hair's breadth.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I remember! That was seriously some race! She
won that through sheer determination and guts!

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
The way she runs with everything she's got, you
can't help but root for her. Talk about focus.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I know what you mean! She's just so
down-to-earth and relatable. It's almost like she's
one of us regular Joes.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That's what makes me want her to win! It feels like
I've won too when she does!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way! Those two understand Kita's
strengths so well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She prayed for more supporters back when we
went to the shrine for New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It looks like that dream has already come true!
choice_data_list: You mean because she's leading the vote?
You mean because she's leading the vote?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. On top of that, her fans talk about her so
enthusiastically.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's getting closer to achieving her other goal of
making her fans smile, too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I need to step up my game.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I have to become someone worthy of running
alongside Kita as her rival!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita might be leagues ahead of me right now, but
I'll forge ahead along my own path, and I won't
quit until I catch her!
choice_data_list:
All the more reason we can't lose the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Kita won it last year, so we can't
afford to drop the ball on this one!
